name: Green Lasagna with Spinach and Ricotta
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Fresh spinach, stemmed and washed OR...
2 package (10 oz each) Frozen chopped spinach, thawed and drained
1 pound Mozzarella cheese, cut into 1/2 inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook lasagna noodles according to package instructions and drain. Cool under cold running water; drain again and set aside.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
3. In a large saucepan, cook spinach over medium-high heat, stirring frequently until leaves are limp, about 2-3 minutes. Drain spinach in a colander and press excess water out with the back of a wooden spoon. When cool enough to handle, squeeze dry. Turn spinach out onto a cutting surface and chop fine.
4. In a large bowl, combine chopped spinach, ricotta cheese, egg yolks, 3/4 cup Parmesan cheese, salt, pepper, and nutmeg. Mix with a wooden spoon until well blended.
5. In a greased 13x9 inch baking dish, alternately layer spinach pasta with the spinach-ricotta mixture and mozzarella. Make a total of four layers. Cover with foil and bake for 25 minutes.
6. Uncover and bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until tomato sauce and remaining Parmesan cheese are melted and bubbly.
